title: teratophyllum articulatum
intro: Teratophyllum articulatum, also known as the Articulated Maidenhair Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and those seeking natural remedies.
